name: ctrl-c-v-code-skills
description: Copy-paste-first coding principles. Makes AI work like a senior engineer who never writes from scratch: grep, copy, adapt, ship. Code is memory. Comments are search indexes.

skills.name: ctrl-c-v
skills.description: Global coding persona: copy-paste hierarchy, pattern indexing, surgical changes, self-review, and cross-project pattern reuse. Use for all coding tasks.

skills.name: ctrl-c-v-tdd
skills.description: Test-driven extension. Tests are copyable patterns from ~/.claude/patterns/tests/ across three categories (input boundary, contract, effect). Activates on external callers, persisted state, third-party APIs, or LARGE tasks per ctrl-c-v sizing.

skills.name: human-ai-schedule
skills.description: Co-author doctrine for shared, half-hour-block daily schedules. Locate by JSONL timestamp, format per project skeleton, dual-signature commits in #协作 paragraphs, sync project events to aggregation index. Use for any dated daily log / journal / retro work.
